title: Manager re-planning mid-directive
description: Morgan currently plans once upfront and the plan is fixed. She should be able to re-plan mid-directive if the audit or build phase reveals the plan is wrong. Stolen from CrewAI hierarchical process.
trigger: When an audit reveals Morgan's plan is fundamentally wrong (next occurrence where audit contradicts plan)

title: Async parallel initiatives
description: Run independent initiatives concurrently. Requires dependency tracking between initiatives. Stolen from AutoGen v0.4 event-driven architecture.
trigger: When sequential execution becomes the bottleneck (directive takes >2 hours with 3+ independent initiatives)

title: Tree search for strategy exploration
description: Explore 2-3 strategic approaches in parallel with entropy-guided selection, instead of Morgan committing to one plan upfront. Stolen from AI Scientist v2.
trigger: When Morgan's single-plan approach fails twice (plan fundamentally wrong after audit)

title: A2A protocol support for cross-framework agent communication
description: Support Google's A2A protocol for cross-framework agent communication.

title: Community personality packs (different org styles)
description: Allow different organizational styles via personality pack presets.

title: Automatic autonomy adjustment based on acceptance rates
description: Automatically adjust risk thresholds and approval requirements based on historical CEO acceptance rates.

title: Engineer proposals — ephemeral engineers can propose scope changes
description: Allow ephemeral engineers to propose scope changes or new work items during execution.

title: DOD amendments during clarification phase (when scope shifts)
description: Allow DOD to be amended when the clarification phase reveals scope changes.

title: DOD effectiveness tracking (pass/fail rates over time)
description: Track DOD pass/fail rates over time in digest self-assessment.

title: /correction add command for CEO to add new standing corrections
description: Allow CEO to add new standing corrections from the report workflow.

title: Elevate 'never run Prisma migrations' to Standing Correction
description: Marcus suggested elevating the Prisma migration safety rule to a formal Standing Correction.
